## Summary

Describe the user-facing or contributor-facing change.

## Why

Explain the problem and the smallest reason this change is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build:services`
- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] No credentials, account data, private work logs, or third-party research material added

## Screenshots

Include screenshots only when the interface changed. Remove personal paths, account details, tokens, and private project content first.
